creator: dl@CyberPunk.ru
text:
colleagues, good afternoon. Happy New Year.

On FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n259842-c89209c674f2: Sat Dec 24 03:59:18 UTC 2022 the problem was not repeated.

I agree that the Bug can be closed. If you manage to repeat the problem on the new OS in the future, I will definitely inform you.

Thank you all. Happy New Year!
